# Energy Monitoring and Operational Baseline Establishment: Setting Up Performance Metrics for Ongoing Efficiency Tracking

## 适用受众
Facilities_Manager

## 写作角度说明
能耗监测与运行基线建立是设施经理建立设备能效管理体系的起始工作。通过在设备调试阶段建立能耗基线数据，为后续的能效改进和优化提供参照基准，识别异常能耗并及时维护。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Setting the energy baseline from the first week of operation — before the system has reached steady-state thermal equilibrium — produces an artificially high baseline that masks subsequent efficiency degradation.

## 参考素材
- Baseline measurement conditions: commissioning complete → system running at normal operating load → ambient conditions within normal range → minimum 7 consecutive days of stable operation
- Key metrics: air supply fan power consumption (kW) → compressed air consumption (m³/h) per door cycle → total equipment energy per day (kWh) → standby power consumption (W) with all doors closed
- Monitoring setup: install power meters on equipment circuits → integrate with BMS trend logging → set up automated daily/weekly/monthly reports → establish upper and lower control limits per metric
- Control limits: typical control limit for energy per cycle = ±15% from rolling 30-day average → any exceedance triggers investigation → causes include filter loading, seal degradation, control valve issues
- Energy reduction opportunities: optimize HVAC interlock to reduce fan run time → adjust pressure setpoints to minimum required → implement standby mode for unused periods

## 关键词
Energy Monitoring, Operational Baseline, Energy Efficiency, Performance Metrics, BMS Trend, Power Consumption
